Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics and Records Camps Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Delaney Oberg - Sports Lab Photography

11 Jaden Clarke

  • Position Guard/Forward
  • Class Senior
  • Hometown Bronx, N.Y.
  • Ht./Wt. 6-6 / 198
  • Prev School Sauk Valley Community College
  • Highschool Frederick Douglass Academy
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

AS A JUNIOR (2024-25)
Appeared in 29 games ... started in three contests ... scored 11.0 points per game ... shot 133-for-265 (.502) from the floor ... totaled 113 rebounds, 34 assists, and 20 steals ... 15 outings with double digit scoring ... 23 points in wins over MSU Denver (11/20) and Navajo Tech (12/20)

AS A SOPHOMORE (Sauk Valley)
Appeared in 30 contests with 22 starts ... first team all-region honoree ... posted a team-best 16.3 points per game ... scored in double figures 25 times ... eight double doubles ... finished with 31 points and 11 rebounds in win over Kankakee Community College (2/3) ... aided team to a NJCAA region 4 semifinal appearance

AS A FRESHMAN (Clinton College)
Played in ten games ... scored in double figures seven times ... 21 points in win over Hosanna Bible (2/21) ... drained two shots from behind the arc in victory over Kentucky State (1/2) ... grabbed eight or more rebounds in five different contests ... posted eight points, ten rebounds, and three blocks in a season-opening win over Carolina Christian (10/22) ... program went 23-2 with an appearance in the NCCAA national title game

AS A FRESHMAN (Iowa Central)
Appeared in one game ... played four minutes in loss to Des Moines Area Community College (1/20) ... scored two points in the contest

HIGH SCHOOL (Frederick Douglass Academy)
Program won 2019 PSAL (Public Schools Athletic League) championship ... won a division city title as a junior ... played all four years for high school team

PERSONAL
Interest from several DI and DII programs out of junior college
